ground_truth.title: Career Training — Hired
ground_truth.main_content: Build your marketable skills through trainings and workshops. In less than two months you'll gain professional qualifications to advance your career. We invite you to explore our available short term career trainings, designed to equip you with a strong foundation in digital skills, customer service and technical skills to gain entry level employment. You'll receive free training, certifications and other credentials, career coaching and job search assistance, placement opportunities, and connections to other resources as needed. Attend an information session every Tuesday at 10:30 am or apply by downloading the Career Pathways program application. Training Pathways include: Office and Medical Administrative Professional (January 12 - February 26, 2026) - Jump start your career in an office professional setting with training in customer service, digital literacy, business professionalism, and medical terminology. Home ENERGY - Explore how changing one part of a home affects homeowners' comfort, health, and safety. Acquire knowledge and skills to earn the Building Science Principles (BSP) credential. Human Services (January 26 - March 5, 2026) - Start your career journey into the field of Human Services with training in customer service, digital literacy, business professionalism, and human services concepts. Medical Manufacturing and Microelectronics (December 1 - December 19, 2025) - Begin a career in manufacturing with job readiness training working with microscopes and hands-on experience with wafer handling, plus certification in Microelectronics Assembler, Microsoft Office, and digital literacy.
with: Build your marketable skills through trainings and workshops.
